description: The team captures Shockley and Daisy attempts to interrogate him about Nadeer's bombing, but Shockley refuses to talk to anyone except Director Mace. Daisy persists, offering a deal in exchange for Radcliffe’s location, but Shockley remains uncooperative.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: You're lucky you're with us and not the FBI. We have you on tape walking into the Senator's office moments before the blast.
What do you care? That woman hated things like you.
Were you following the Russians' orders? We know about Anton Ivanov. Why'd he target Nadeer?
Did Radcliffe make the bomb? You see, I'm trying to help you. If you get us to Radcliffe, I can get you a deal.
The only freak I'll speak to is the Director.
Okay. Let's try again now, shall we? Where is Radcliffe?
